title: Iravingu Thevai Song Lyrics From 96 Movie
stanzas:
iravingu theevaai
nammai chooluthe
vidiyalum irulaai
varudhe.

ninaivugal theeyaai
alai modhuthe
udalingu saavaai
ezhuthe.

pirive uravaai
karainthu pogiren
uyirin uyirai
pirindhu pogiren.

malaigalin nadhipol
manam vazhinthu
vanthaai.
varandidum nilathil
pala kadalgal
thanthaai.

kanave thunaiyaai
ozhinthu pogattum.
iravingu theevaai
nammai chooluthe
vidiyalum irulaai
varudhe.

indha thaamarai
kulam meeri
thani aaguthe.
adhan sooriyan
pagalindri
veyil kaayuthe.

oru pathaiyil
iru jeevan
thunai theduthe.
ada kaalangal
thadai meeri
thadai poduthe.

nee indri naane
thinam vazhvathoru
vazhvaa..
vaazhve vaa neethaan
uyirin uyire
varavaa.. varavaa..

thinam thinam
uyirthezhum manam
andraaam maayume.
uyir varai nirainthunai
manam kondaadi vazhume

marangal sainthu
koodu veezhnthum
kuyilgal raagam
paadume.

iravu theernthu
oyntha podhum
nilavu porumai
kaakkume.

mazhai vazhi
kadal vidum
vin kaathal mannai
serume.

unai udal prindhinum
en kaadhal unnai
sernthu vazhume.
nee poi vaa vaa
tamilStanzas:
இரவிங்கு தீவாய்
நம்மை சூழுதே
விடியலும் இருளாய் வருதே.
நினைவுகள் தீயாய்
அலை மோதுதே
உடலிங்கு சாவாய் எழுதே.

பிரிவே உறவாய்
கரைந்து போகிறேன்
உயிரின் உயிரே
பிரிந்து போகிறேன்.

மலைகளின் நதிபோல்
மனம் வழிந்து வந்தாய்.
வறண்டிடும் நிலத்தில்
பல காதல்கள் தந்தாய்.
கனவே துணையாய்
ஒழிந்து போகட்டும்.

இரவிங்கு தீவாய்
நம்மை சூழுதே
விடியலும் இருளாய் வருதே.

இந்த தாமரை
குளம் மீறி தனி ஆகுதே.
அதன் சூரியன்
பகலின்றி வெயில் காயிதே.

ஒரு பாதையில்
இரு ஜீவன் துணை தேடுதே.
அட காலங்கள் தடை மீறி
தடை போடுதே.

நீ இன்றி நானே
தினம் வாழ்வதொரு வாழ்வா..
வாழ்வே வா நீதான்
உயிரின் உயிரே
வரவா.. வரவா..

தினம் தினம் உயிர்த்தெழும்
மனம் அன்றாடம்  மாயுமே.
உயிர் வரை நிறைந்துணை
மனம் கொண்டாடி வாழும்

மரங்கள் சாய்ந்து
கூடு வீழ்ந்து
குயில்கள் ராகம் பாடும்.
இரவு தீர்ந்து ஓய்ந்த போதும்
நிலவு பொறுமை காக்கும்.

மழை வழி கடல் விடும்
வின்காதல் மண்ணை சேருமே.
உன்னை உடல் பிரிந்தினும்
என் காதல்
உன்னை சேர்ந்து வாழும்.
நீ போய் வா வா

seo.title: Iravingu Thevai Song Lyrics From 96 Movie
seo.description: Full Iravingu Theevaai songs lyrics, 96 Movie Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Uma Devi, Music: Govind Vasantha, Singer(s): Chinmayi, Pradeep Kumar.
seo.keywords: Uma Devi, 96 Movie, Govind Vasantha, Chinmayi, Pradeep Kumar, Iravingu Theevaai full lyrics, 96 Movie songs lyrics, Iravingu Theevaai lyrics snippets, Iravingu Theevaai WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Iravingu Theevaai lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Iravingu Thevai?

The song explores themes of love, longing, and heartbreak, capturing the emotional turmoil of separation.

Who are the singers of this song?

Chinmayi and Pradeep Kumar lend their voices to this soulful track.

What role does this song play in the 96 Movie?

The song underscores the emotional journey of the protagonists, highlighting their past memories and present feelings.

Who composed the music for Iravingu Thevai?

The music was composed by Govind Vasantha, known for his evocative and soulful compositions.

When was the song released?

The song was released in 2018 as part of the 96 Movie soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Iravingu Thevai from the 96 Movie is a poignant exploration of love and separation. Sung by Chinmayi and Pradeep Kumar, it beautifully captures the emotional turmoil of the characters as they reminisce about their past. The lyrics by Uma Devi evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing, while Govind Vasantha's music adds depth to the melancholic mood. This track resonates with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of love and loss.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the poignant beauty of Iravingu Thevai from the 96 Movie, where Chinmayi and Pradeep Kumar's soulful voices blend seamlessly with Govind Vasantha's haunting melodies. This song captures the essence of love and longing, making it a timeless piece in Tamil cinema. Dive into the emotional depths of this track and let it resonate with your heart.
stanzaMeanings: The night surrounds us like an island, even the dawn turns into darkness.
Memories crash like waves, burning, and the body writes its own end.
I melt away like a relationship in separation, leaving my soul behind.
Like rivers from mountains, you flowed into my heart. You gave many oceans to this drying land.
Let dreams leave as companions. The night surrounds us like an island, even the dawn turns into darkness.
This lotus pond overflows and stands alone. Its sun burns without daylight.
Two lives on one path search for companionship. Time overcomes obstacles and creates new ones.
Is life worth living without you? Life, come back, you are my soul, come back.
Every day the soul rises, the mind is amazed. Until life ends, the mind celebrates with you.
Even when trees bend and nests fall, the cuckoo sings its tune.
Even when the night ends and fades, the moon waits patiently.
Rain travels through paths, and the sky's love reaches the earth.
Even if separated from you, my love will always find you. Come back, come back.
